name: @forgeax/engine-physics
description: Physics interface package for forgeax-engine — ECS component schemas (RigidBody / Collider / CollisionEvent), PhysicsWorld Resource interface, PhysicsErrorCode union.

bundle-size.reason: interface package — zero runtime payload beyond type exports; bundle-size tracked by backend packages

fps.reason: interface package — no runtime systems; fps tracked by backend / demo

bench.reason: interface package — pure type definitions and component schemas; no hot-path benchmark surface

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; smoke gate covered by hello-physics demo (M4)
